# Oluwafemi Joshua

> Technical Product Manager building human-centered technology at the edge of AI.

## About

Oluwafemi Joshua is a Technical Product Manager currently at Tech1M, running product strategy end to end. He trained as a Chemical Engineer and came into product through requirements gathering, QA, and enterprise transformation. He has 5+ years of experience building products in early-stage and growth environments.

He specializes in AI-native products, product-led growth (PLG), LLM evaluation frameworks, and the work of making products actually stick with real users.

## Philosophy

- Defaults to discovery before solution
- Sits with problems until finding the question nobody else asked
- Believes the product is never the point — the human problem is
- Conviction is not certainty — commits fully while staying open to being wrong

## Key Achievements

- 35% free-to-paid conversion on 2,300 signups (H1 2024)
- $120k pilot revenue closed in under 6 months at Tech1M
- 50,000+ users on enterprise rollout at Tedbree with 95% CSAT
- 75% user adoption within 3 months on enterprise deployment
- Built LLM evaluation and guardrails framework: content relevance, groundedness scoring, PII safeguards, rubric-based output evaluation

## Expertise

- Product Management
- AI/ML Product Development
- LLM Evaluation Frameworks
- Product-Led Growth (PLG)
- Enterprise Transformation
- Discovery-Driven Development
- Human-Centered Design
- SaaS and B2C Products
- EdTech
- RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation)
- Technical Writing

## Writing

Publishes on Medium (product, AI, the work) and Substack (faith, humans, the condition).
